message:
beads: sync issue tracker — close completed mission subsystem issues

Close completed mission sub-issues reflecting implemented work:
  - ft-1i2ge.3.6 (idempotency keys and duplicate-dispatch prevention)
  - ft-1i2ge.4.5 (conflict detection and deconfliction messaging)
  - ft-1i2ge.4.6 (global kill-switch and safe-mode degradation)
  - ft-1i2ge.4.7 (adversarial safety guardrail test suite)
  - ft-1i2ge.5.1 (mission CLI command surface)
  - ft-1i2ge.8.4 (prepare-phase coordinator)

Transition ft-1i2ge.5.2 (robot mission endpoints) to in_progress.
Reset various WIP epics back to open for future prioritization.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
